Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Case For Failure To Prosecute Action, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Alfred W. Gerisch, Jr. (Ccp 583.410 Seq.)
Off Calendar Oct-22-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Gina A. Leago, Esq., LaFollette, Johnson, DeHaas, Fesler, Silberberg & Ames (213) 426-3600 for Defendant and Moving Party Grosvenor Bus Lines, dba Grey Line and Coach USA, Inc.
John H. Aspelin, Esq., Aspelin & Bridgman LLP (415) 296-9812 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Clark
RULING:
A R G U E D. Plaintiff's CCP 473 Declaration is accepted by the Court; however, Plaintiff's opposition was not timely filed. DEFENDANT GROSVENOR BUS LINES, INC., DBA GREY LINE AMD COACH USA, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Case For Failure To Prosecute Action, in the Court's discretion, is DENIED pursuant to CCP 483.410. As an interim sanction, the Court GRANTS attorney fees, upon application, to Defense Counsel Leago for preparation, travel and today's hearing; Defendant's motion shall not include preparation of the motion. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
